items.title: Iran says no new commitments on nuclear sites after Vance says inspectors to be invited back
items.summary: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.

items.title: Ransom note claims Nancy Guthrie died after abduction
items.summary: The note from the possible kidnappers reportedly stated that they did not mean for her to die and included an apology to the family.

items.title: Montreal shooting leaves officer, civilian and suspect dead
items.summary: It was the first time in 24 years that a Montreal police officer was  killed in the line of duty, the city's police chief said.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 抓到了！28歲台女赴日當車手  東京8旬嬤痛失近1億日幣
items.summary: 28歲台灣籍女子葉彥岑（イエ・イエンセン，音譯），涉嫌在日本對一名8旬老婦詐騙，受害老婦累計被騙走9500萬日圓（約新台幣1862萬元），目葉女已被東京警視廳逮捕，其姓名與長相也...…

items.title: 戰火逼近莫斯科 烏軍攻擊衛星通訊中心杜布納
items.summary: 烏克蘭軍方22日表示，已對位於莫斯科州杜布納（Dubna）的俄羅斯太空通訊中心發動攻擊。烏方公布的影片顯示，設施區域遇襲後升起濃煙，成為近期烏軍深入俄國本土遠程打擊行動的最新案...…

items.title: 世界最響亮人類！澳洲58歲男大吼達122分貝 破金氏世界紀錄
